name: 7 Layer Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Prepare a baking dish by lining it with parchment paper or greasing with butter.
3. Melt chocolate chips in a heat-safe bowl set over a saucepan of simmering water, stirring until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and stir in pecans, butterscotch chips, condensed milk, and shredded coconut until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish and spread evenly.
6. Bake for 10 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
7. Turn the bars out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Store at room temperature for up to a week, making them ideal for picnics without refrigeration.
